sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71071" key="nosseu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νοσσεύω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νοσσιά</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νοσσίον</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νοσσίς</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νοσσοποιέω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νοσσός</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νοσσοτροφέω</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">νεοσς</itype>-.</entryFree>
